items.name: Mark O'Connor
items.bio: Mark is a retired GP and has lived in the village for over 20 years

items.name: James Bernard Merrick
items.role: Trustee and oversight of building maintenance
items.bio: Jim is a founder Trustee and oversees the safety and maintenance of the building

items.name: Mark William Francis
items.bio: Mark is a founder Trustee and oversees all aspects of the financial governance of the Hub

items.name: Geoffrey James Coombs
items.role: Trustee and Parish Council relationship lead
items.bio: Geoff is a founder Trustee and also Chairs the local Parish Council and oversees the relationship with the Trustees and Parish Council

items.name: Lyndsey Burch
items.bio: Lyndsey has joined the current Trustees and is involved in a wide range of voluntary activities in managing the Hub
